image_alt: Calm neutral-toned living room with a leather armchair, bouclé swivel chair, walnut sideboard, and a tall blue abstract painting
swatch_label: Lead finish for the Gulshan loft project
headline: We start with the life that happens in a room, then design around it
pull_quote: A beautiful room that fights your routine isn't beautiful for long.
body_1: Most studios design for the photograph. We design for the Tuesday — the school-run chaos, the late dinner, the spot where mail piles up. Materials and proportion come second to that honesty, which is exactly why our rooms keep looking right five years on.
body_2: Every project pairs an architect with a materials lead from day one, so structural decisions and finish decisions are never made in isolation.
